MODULE: cosmos.tools.security.forensics
FILE: cosmos/tools/security/forensics.py (658 lines)
CATEGORY: tools

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Forensics Toolkit

"Good news, everyone! I can analyze digital evidence like a 31st century detective!"

Digital forensics capabilities for security investigation.

CLASSES:
- ArtifactType(Enum): Types of forensic artifacts.
- FileArtifact: File forensic artifact.
- ProcessArtifact: Process forensic artifact.
- ForensicTimeline: Timeline of forensic events.
- ForensicsToolkit: Digital forensics toolkit.

Capabilities:
- File system analysis
- Process inspe
